events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: mixed neutrals/grounds in a subpanel violates NEC 408.40/250.142(B) (bonding only allowed at service) and 200.4 (one conductor per terminal) — this creates energized-enclosure shock hazard and fire risk, so the work fails at critical risk until the neutral/ground buses are isolated, the subpanel bonding jumper is removed, and the correction is meter-verified before re-energizing.
